title: Promise of Zion

sections.label: Intro
lines: Oh, the vow, the sacred plea,
A heart’s yearning destiny.
The ark of promise, drawn in fire,
A beacon calling, lifting higher.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: David swore beneath the skies,
"I will not rest, nor close my eyes,
'Til the Lord's house stands in grace,
A holy throne, a dwelling place."

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Rise, oh Zion, lift your song,
The echoes of forever, strong.
Heaven bends to touch the earth,
In your courts, we find rebirth.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: This is the place, chosen and bright,
A crown of forever, a throne of light.
Here we are one, the promise unfolds,
The city of glory, the story foretold.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The Lord declares, "I’ve chosen you,
A place of peace, a vision true.
Your foes will fade, your lamp will shine,
A kingdom’s promise, wholly divine."

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Rise, oh Zion, lift your song,
The echoes of forever, strong.
Heaven bends to touch the earth,
In your courts, we find rebirth.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: This is the place, chosen and bright,
A crown of forever, a throne of light.
Here we are one, the promise unfolds,
The city of glory, the story foretold.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, every tear, every prayer,
He hears them all, He’s always there.
The ark of truth, our guiding flame,
Forever dwelling, we praise His name.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: This is the place, chosen and bright,
A crown of forever, a throne of light.
Here we are one, the promise unfolds,
The city of glory, the story foretold.

sections.label: Post-Chorus
lines: Hallelujah, Zion’s call,
Hallelujah, one and all.
Hallelujah, throne of gold,
Hallelujah, love untold.

sections.label: Outro
lines: In the courts of the King, we find our song,
Forever rising, forever strong.

epigraph: For the LORD hath chosen Zion
